Home / Services / Luxury Vinyl Plank

Luxury Vinyl Plank

Waterproof flooring perfect for basements and busy households.

LVP has become the top choice for Westerville parents and Grove City retirees needing worry-free floors. Our planks feature a 40-mil wear layer - twice the thickness of big-box options - to withstand hockey gear and grandkids' toys.

We install with specialized underlayment that absorbs sound in open-concept homes while preventing cold transfer from concrete slabs. The patented locking systems we use won't separate during humidity spikes like cheaper alternatives often do.

For homes near the Scioto River floodplain, we offer completely waterproof cores that survived 2022's record rainfall. Textures include hand-scraped looks that complement Dublin's traditional interiors without real wood's maintenance.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Digital measurement with laser accuracy
  2. 02 Step 2: Subfloor leveling (critical for Ohio's shifting clay soils)
  3. 03 Step 3: Sound-dampening underlayment installation
  4. 04 Step 4: Seamless transition molding at all doorways

Benefits

  • 100% waterproof - ideal for basement rec rooms
  • Warmer underfoot than tile during winters
  • Scratch-resistant surface handles pet traffic
  • No acclimation time needed versus hardwood

Frequently Asked Questions

How does LVP handle our temperature extremes?

We use commercial-grade planks rated for -20°F to 120°F - crucial for sunrooms and seasonal cabins around Alum Creek.

Can you install over radiant heat?

Yes, with specific low-conductivity underlayments that won't trap heat. We've done 27 systems in Upper Arlington this year alone.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with luxury vinyl plank? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: 555-flo-r93
